description: Binary pass/fail quality checklist for AI-generated page layouts. Replaces continuous VUD scoring with simple yes/no checks. AI MUST run this checklist after generating any full-page layout and BEFORE presenting to the user.

rules.description: A layout archetype from layout-archetypes.json MUST be selected before any page generation begins

action.message: Before generating any full-page layout: (1) determine pageType from user intent, (2) select matching archetype from layout-archetypes.json, (3) use archetype skeleton as the structural starting point. If no archetype matches, ask the user.

checklist.question: Was a layout archetype selected before generation?
checklist.passCondition: An archetype ID from layout-archetypes.json was chosen and its skeleton was used
checklist.failAction: Stop. Select archetype first, then regenerate.

rules.description: All P1 (primary task) content MUST be fully visible above the fold on a 1440x900 viewport

action.message: Check: On a 1440x900 viewport, is the user's primary task (data table, form, dashboard stats, search bar, etc.) fully visible without scrolling? If not, the layout wastes above-the-fold space.

checklist.question: Is all P1 content visible above the fold (1440x900)?
checklist.passCondition: Primary task UI is fully visible without scrolling on standard viewport
checklist.failAction: Reduce header/hero height, remove decorative elements, or restructure layout.

rules.description: WEBAPP and DOCUMENTATION pages must NEVER have hero images or decorative full-width headers

action.message: WEBAPP and DOCUMENTATION pages must start with functional content immediately after the header bar. No hero images, no decorative gradients, no oversized headings. Page title max text-2xl (24px).

checklist.question: Does the WEBAPP/DOCS page have any hero image or decorative header?
checklist.passCondition: No hero, no decorative gradient, no heading larger than text-2xl. Functional content starts immediately.
checklist.failAction: Remove hero/decorative elements. Replace with functional content (filters, data, navigation).

rules.description: Visual hierarchy MUST NOT exceed the depth limit for the page type (2 for WEBAPP/DOCS, 3 for MARKETING/PRODUCT)

action.message: Count distinct heading levels used above the fold. WEBAPP/DOCS: max 2 levels (e.g., H1 page title + H2 section). MARKETING/PRODUCT: max 3 levels (H1 + H2 + H3). More levels create visual noise.

checklist.question: Does the page exceed its hierarchy depth limit?
checklist.failAction: Flatten hierarchy. Merge heading levels or use visual weight (bold, size) instead of more levels.

rules.description: Pages MUST NOT have more primary CTAs above the fold than the archetype allows

action.message: Count buttons styled as primary (filled, high-contrast) above the fold. WEBAPP dashboards: 0 primary CTAs (actions are contextual). Forms: 1 (Submit/Save). Marketing: max 2 (hero + nav). Multiple primary CTAs dilute focus.

checklist.question: Does the page have more primary CTAs than the archetype allows?
checklist.failAction: Demote extra CTAs to secondary (outline) or tertiary (text link) styling.

rules.description: Marketing heroes MUST NOT exceed 60vh and MUST contain headline + value prop + CTA

action.message: If page has a hero section: (1) check height ≤ 60vh for MARKETING, ≤ 40vh for PRODUCT, (2) verify hero contains headline text, (3) verify hero contains value proposition, (4) verify hero contains visible CTA button. Hero without all three is pure decoration.

checklist.question: Does the hero exceed its height limit OR lack headline/value-prop/CTA?
checklist.passCondition: Hero height ≤ limit AND contains headline + value prop + CTA button
checklist.failAction: Reduce hero height. Add missing elements. If hero has no CTA, it's decoration — shrink or remove.

rules.description: All required elements defined in the selected archetype MUST be present in the generated layout

action.message: Cross-reference the generated layout against the selected archetype's requiredElements list. Every required element must be present. Missing elements indicate an incomplete layout.

checklist.question: Are all archetype-required elements present in the layout?
checklist.passCondition: Every element in archetype.requiredElements exists in the generated page
checklist.failAction: Add missing elements. If intentionally omitted, document the override reason.

rules.description: Prohibited elements defined in the selected archetype MUST NOT appear in the generated layout

action.message: Cross-reference the generated layout against the selected archetype's prohibitedElements list. None of these elements may be present. Their presence indicates the AI fell back to a generic template pattern.

checklist.question: Does the layout contain any archetype-prohibited elements?
checklist.passCondition: No element from archetype.prohibitedElements exists in the generated page
checklist.failAction: Remove prohibited elements. Replace with functional content appropriate to the page type.

rules.description: All maxHeight constraints from the archetype MUST be respected in CSS/styling

action.message: For each element in archetype.requiredElements that has a maxHeight, verify the generated CSS does not exceed it. Common violations: header > 56px, toolbar > 48px, hero > 60vh.

checklist.question: Do any elements exceed their archetype maxHeight?
checklist.passCondition: All elements with maxHeight constraints have CSS heights ≤ the specified limit
checklist.failAction: Reduce element height to match constraint. Tighten padding, reduce font size, or remove decorative spacing.

rules.description: Layout MUST use design system tokens — no raw hex colors or magic numbers

action.message: Scan generated CSS/HTML for: (1) raw hex colors (#1a1a2e) — must use hsl(var(--token)), (2) magic pixel values (17px, 93px) — must use token scale (0.25rem increments), (3) arbitrary font sizes — must use text-sm/base/lg/xl/2xl scale.

checklist.question: Does the layout use raw hex colors or magic pixel values?
checklist.passCondition: All colors use CSS custom properties, all spacing uses token scale, all typography uses scale
checklist.failAction: Replace raw values with design system tokens. See shared/design-system/globals.css.

usage.when: After generating any full-page layout, BEFORE presenting to user
usage.howToRun: For each rule in this file, evaluate the checklist.question against the generated output. If passCondition is false, execute failAction before proceeding.
usage.reportFormat: Include a compact quality check summary at the end of generation: ✅ Archetype: {id} | P1 ATF: pass | Hero: pass/N/A | Elements: 8/8 | Tokens: pass
usage.overrides: User can override any check with explicit instruction. Log overrides in asset metadata.
